title: Quay
description: A specific platform, bay, or boarding area within a Stop Place at which passengers board or alight from a vehicle.

publicCode.description: Publicly displayed platform or bay code

quayType.description: Type of quay (e.g. RAIL_PLATFORM, BUS_BAY, FERRY_BERTH)

stopPlaceRef.description: Reference to the parent Stop Place

id.description: Unique identifier for the fulfillment stop

instructions.description: Instructions for passengers at this stop

time.description: Expected time window at this stop
